opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is boring straight through the middle of my stomach into my spine, and I can't stop throwing up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe stomach pain going into my back for the last day, vomiting non-stop and can't keep anything down.

symptom_narrative.character: severe, boring pain straight through from my stomach to my back
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my stomach, going straight through to my spine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: leaning forward, sitting hunched over on the edge of the couch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: vomiting more than 10 times since yesterday, can't keep any fluids down, feel weak and lightheaded, felt a bit feverish overnight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can barely move, sitting hunched over, feel very weak and lethargic

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: had a heavy weekend of drinking just before this started
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: sibling at home helping but finding it hard to manage the vomiting

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried and exhausted, wants relief from the vomiting and pain

communication_style.typical_message_style: short messages, feels too weak/nauseated to type much, sibling may help relay details
